title: api: support build `--hooks-dir` for API
body:
Build API now accepts `ocihooksdir` expecting that hooks script and configuration
json file is already present on server side.

[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]
[NO TESTS NEEDED]
Not sure if this is easily testable in CI

See: https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues/4068#issuecomment-1226047477

```release-note
api: support build `ocihooksdir` for API
```

comments.body:

Any chance for realasing this in v4.3.0 ?

@lukasmrtvy I think we will miss this for `v4.3.0` since as discussed above, for the right design we will need some changes in buildah. I am on PTO this week I'll add these changes to buildah as soon as I am back.
@flouthoc what is going on with this one?
I need to add a `containers.conf` field and make build API use it, I am putting this PR on draft and will re-open just after we have needed buildah changes.
What is the status of this, please? Thanks

Going through old inactive PRs...
Feel free to re-open when reviving it.
